content.body: One week for me as well.

What's the best way to store a JSON object in a realm-agnostic place? I could parse it as a string and save that, but that seems hacky. I can't just store a WebIDL `object` off to the side, since it wraps the JavaScript realm-backed one, right?
content.formatted_body: What's the best way to store a JSON object in a realm-agnostic place? I could parse it as a string and save that, but that seems hacky. I can't just store a WebIDL object off to the side, since it wraps the JavaScript realm-backed one, right?

content.body: I basically want it to be an opaque infra map, kinda like how dictionaries are when a JS object gets converted to one..
